overview.description: The CoinShares Altcoins ETF (DIME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund actively manages a portfolio of exchange-traded products offering exposure to alternative cryptocurrencies to Bitcoin and Ethereum. DIME was launched on Oct 6, 2025 and is issued by CoinShares.

data.title: Inside Hyperliquid: How the Fee Engine Works
data.text: Hyperliquid has a feature that separates it from most crypto tokens. The protocol routes 99% of its trading fees into daily open-market purchases of its native token, HYPE.
